title: Lead Revenue Manager at Postcard Hotels

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Postcard Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Postcard Hotels has an exciting opening for a Revenue Manager at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Postcard Hotels:
Postcard Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels!
